items.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
items.dek: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.
items.body: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
items.dek: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.
items.body: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: China's Xi Jinping to make rare visit to North Korea
items.dek: Xi will be in North Korea from 8-9 June, a rare visit to the isolated regime that is a longstanding ally of Beijing.
items.body: Xi will be in North Korea from 8-9 June, a rare visit to the isolated regime that is a longstanding ally of Beijing.
items.author: IriLine Desk
